final:
// // This module selects between two 4-bit data inputs, Data1 and Data2, based on the control signal sel. When sel is 0, the output reflects the value of Data2; when sel is 1, the output reflects the value of Data1.
module top_module( 
	output [3:0] out , 
	input sel, 
	input [3:0] Data1, 
	input [3:0] Data2 ) ;assign out = sel ? Data2 : Data1 ;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two 4-bit data inputs, Data1 and Data2, based on the control signal sel. When sel is 0, the output reflects the value of Data2; when sel is 1, the output reflects the value of Data1.
